channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-18 11:07 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Je vais être clair. Ce qui a produit les viols de masse. C’est le gauchisme / le wokisme / le social...
item.description: Je vais être clair. Ce qui a produit les viols de masse. C’est le gauchisme / le wokisme / le socialisme et l’empathie suicidaire. Les gens vont devoir choisir un camp. Le premier camp, c’est le camp de la liberté, la responsabilité individuelle, du mérite et les villes qui ne sentent pas le pipi. Le deuxième camp, c’est le camp dysfonctionnel, où tout se transforme en merde, le camp de l’étatisme socialo-communiste à outrance qui rend les gens malheureux et qui dans sa phase terminal, accepte que 250.000 gamines se fassent violer pour le “bien commun” et la peur de se faire traiter de “rascite”. Partez. Et ne revenez jamais. Ceux qui ont participé de près ou de loin aux grooming gangs, en conscience. Vous méritez l’exil ou le bagne.

item.title: @elonmusk: Maybe WSJ isn’t that bad after all 😂
item.description: Maybe WSJ isn’t that bad after all 😂

item.title: @elonmusk: No one can save you when they become the police
item.description: No one can save you when they become the police

item.title: @elonmusk: And this report is just the tip of an enormous iceberg of evil
item.description: And this report is just the tip of an enormous iceberg of evil

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk: ”I think there are great things in every culture. We don’t want the German culture to dis...
item.description: Elon Musk: ”I think there are great things in every culture. We don’t want the German culture to disappear. We don’t want French culture to disappear. We don’t want Korean culture to disappear, or Japan, or America, or anywhere. I think we should be very cautious about having some sort of global mixing pot, because every place will be the same, and there won’t be any unique cultures in the world. Which I think would make the world worse. So I think we need to preserve these country cultures, and that’s the future that I think is better. I think that most people would agree is better. We shouldn’t have cultures disappear. And currently, based on the current birth rates and the sort of so-called multiculturalism and globalism, what we’re actually seeing is the dilution of individual cultures and the destruction and death of individual cultures, which I think is terrible for the future.”

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s now easier to move local agents to the cloud so they can keep working with your laptop closed. ...
item.description: It’s now easier to move local agents to the cloud so they can keep working with your laptop closed. Prompt Cursor from your phone, run many agents in parallel, and get back PRs with demos of their work.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build just got new update with new improvements, features, and bug fixes Release Notes: v0.2.55...
item.description: Grok Build just got new update with new improvements, features, and bug fixes Release Notes: v0.2.55 Features: • Added option to fully disable the hunk tracker via --hunk-tracker-mode, GROK_HUNK_TRACKER, or config. Bug Fixes: • Windows install scripts now run cleanly via irm | iex without spurious BOM errors. • Tables & wide content no longer leave stray characters next to timestamps in the scrollback. • Mermaid diagrams now render node labels cleanly without HTML tags or raw markdown syntax. • MCP servers using HTTP now recover automatically after temporary connection drops! • Very long sessions can now scroll all the way to the bottom of the conversation history

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: California Birth Rate Falls Below Replacement Level • California’s fertility rate hit a re...
item.description: BREAKING: California Birth Rate Falls Below Replacement Level • California’s fertility rate hit a record low • It fell from 2.21 children per woman in 2007 to 1.48 in 2023 • That’s far below the 2.1 replacement level • By 2038, deaths could outnumber births in California • Public school enrollment could drop by about 630,000 students

item.title: @elonmusk: Doctors and hospitals used junk science from WPATH to justify selling gender transition procedures t...
item.description: Doctors and hospitals used junk science from WPATH to justify selling gender transition procedures to kids and their parents. Huge props to Andrew and his team for taking an important step in our efforts to end this outrageous practice.

item.title: @elonmusk: "My favorite enterprise AI service is Cursor. It is an AI coder & every one of our engineers, 100% i...
item.description: "My favorite enterprise AI service is Cursor. It is an AI coder & every one of our engineers, 100% is now assisted by AI coders & our productivity has gone up incredibly. These companies are some of the fastest-growing companies in world & they address enterprise" — Jensen Huang

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 is the #1 news app in the UK. This is exactly why the BBC, The Telegraph and other UK legacy media...
item.description: 𝕏 is the #1 news app in the UK. This is exactly why the BBC, The Telegraph and other UK legacy media keep pushing negative fake attacks on Elon Musk. They are getting destroyed in the rankings. The British public has rejected them. Legacy media is finished. They are lashing out in pure panic because they lost control. 𝕏 is winning because it gave people what they actually wanted - truth.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 is here Our new image-to-video model with sharper realism, better physics and...
item.description: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 is here Our new image-to-video model with sharper realism, better physics and faster generations 🧵grok.com/imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: Make our Sun sentient to understand the Universe and extend the light of consciousness to the stars
